twoSessionConcurrency.interpretation: Two independent hosted PostgreSQL sessions completed the canonical lock-order transitions without lock timeout or deadlock and rolled back cleanly. This is runtime concurrency evidence, but not api.create_invitation/accept_invitation/revoke_invitation HTTP E2E because rehearsal has no confirmed Auth user or Auth-linked profile.

security.interpretation: Supabase linter still reports managed public PostGIS objects and intentional no-policy deny-all tables. Runtime HTTP proves public is not an exposed PostgREST schema. Findings are recorded, not deleted or mislabeled as remediated.

performance.interpretation: All remaining findings are unused-index observations on a near-empty rehearsal and are not deletion evidence.
